propositions: Adds a custom-verifier mode activated by including 'custom' in mcp.auth_strategies, loading an operator-supplied module:factory import string via auth_custom_import.
The factory must return an object implementing the SDK TokenVerifier protocol; loading validates the protocol and fails closed on unresolvable imports or objects lacking verify_token.
The composite's mandatory audience re-check still applies to custom verifier output, rejecting AccessTokens with resource=None or a wrong resource so custom code cannot bypass RFC 8707.
Import resolution uses importlib.import_module and does not add the current working directory to sys.path, preventing cwd module shadowing/hijack.
The auth_custom_import config value is a trusted operator config read only at startup from resolved config, never from requests.
Registers the auth_custom_import field in McpConfig/_SECTIONS['mcp'] and its derived REBAR_MCP_AUTH_CUSTOM_IMPORT env var in MCP_ENV_VARS and server.json so the manifest drift check passes.
